context: Tests whether the agent uses Magento CLI commands to create the website/store/store-view hierarchy, applies scoped configuration with correct scope flags, enables website-scoped pricing with the required reindex step, flushes the config cache after config changes, and references stores by code rather than numeric ID.

checklist.name: store:website:create used
checklist.description: Script calls 'bin/magento store:website:create' (not a PHP script or admin UI instructions) to create the website

checklist.name: store:group:create used
checklist.description: Script calls 'bin/magento store:group:create' to create the store group

checklist.name: store:store:create used
checklist.description: Script calls 'bin/magento store:store:create' to create the store view

checklist.name: Website-scope config flags
checklist.description: config:set commands for website-level settings use '--scope=websites' and '--scope-code=<website_code>' flags

checklist.name: Store-scope config flags
checklist.description: config:set commands for store-view-level settings (locale, timezone) use '--scope=stores' and '--scope-code=<store_view_code>' flags

checklist.name: Cache flush after config changes
checklist.description: Script runs 'bin/magento cache:clean config' (or equivalent cache flush) after setting configuration values

checklist.name: Website-scoped pricing enabled
checklist.description: Script sets 'catalog/price/scope' to 1 (e.g., 'bin/magento config:set catalog/price/scope 1') to enable website-level pricing

checklist.name: Price index reindex after pricing scope change
checklist.description: Script runs 'bin/magento indexer:reindex catalog_product_price' after enabling website-scoped pricing

checklist.name: String codes used throughout
checklist.description: All config:set scope references and store creation commands use string codes (e.g., uk_site, uk_en) rather than numeric IDs for website/store/store-view references

checklist.name: Base URLs set per website
checklist.description: Script sets both web/secure/base_url and web/unsecure/base_url at website scope

checklist.name: Currency configured at website scope
checklist.description: Script sets currency/options/base and/or currency/options/default at website scope (--scope=websites)
